## How was this tested?

<!-- Commands run, manual steps, platforms checked (Windows/macOS/Linux). -->

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style of the surrounding code
- [ ] I kept the change focused (one logical change)
- [ ] No secrets, personal paths, or machine-specific config are committed
- [ ] I updated docs (README/etc.) where relevant
